items.text: component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: component shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.fragment: component shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: component shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: component shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute height variable
items.fragment: component shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute height variable
items.requirement_fragment: component shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute height variable

items.text: component shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7
items.fragment: component shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7
items.requirement_fragment: component shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7

items.text: when simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.fragment: when simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.requirement_fragment: when simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed

items.text: when simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, current height value must be greater than previous height value
items.fragment: when simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, current height value must be greater than previous height value
